description_long: This community center is a large, multi-story complex with a prominent rectangular main building featuring a flat roof and a pinkish facade. The structure is surrounded by several smaller buildings, green lawns, and tree-lined streets, creating a campus-like environment. The main building appears to have rooftop equipment and multiple window rows, suggesting office or multipurpose spaces inside. Adjacent to the main structure are parking lots with numerous vehicles, as well as additional low-rise buildings with red and gray roofs. The grounds are landscaped with pathways, trees, and open green areas, providing communal outdoor spaces. The overall layout is organized and modern, with clear vehicular and pedestrian access routes.
description: A large, modern community center complex with a pink multi-story main building, surrounded by smaller structures, parking lots, and landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: The view highlights the broad pink facade of the main building, rooftop details, and adjacent parking and green spaces.
description_view_1: This angle shows the main building's side, the central avenue lined with trees and cars, and the arrangement of smaller buildings and parking lots.
description_view_2: The rear of the main building is visible, along with the full extent of the parking area, smaller buildings, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the side of the main building, the tree-lined street, and the distribution of smaller structures and open spaces.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with modernist influences, characterized by flat roofs, clean lines, large window sections, and minimal ornamentation.
